About.title: About Us
About.description: Form-Cert is the leading EU-grade professional training and certification platform, connecting learners, trainers, and institutions.
About.whoWeAreP1: Form-Cert is a comprehensive training and certification platform designed to meet the professional development needs of individuals, organizations, and institutions across the European Union.
About.whoWeAreP2: We bridge the gap between quality education and professional advancement by offering EU-recognized certifications, expert-led courses, and flexible learning pathways.
About.ourMissionDesc: To provide accessible, high quality professional training that empowers learners to advance their careers, support trainers to share their expertise, and enables institutions to develop their teams.
About.ourVisionDesc: To become the most trusted platform for professional development in Europe, where quality meets accessibility and where learners everywhere can access world-class training and credible certifications.
About.forLearnersDesc: We provide access to professional courses, interactive training, and EU-recognized certifications to advance your career.
About.forTrainersDesc: We offer trainers tools, courses, and resources to create, deliver and manage training with maximum impact on professionals.
About.forInstitutionsDesc: We help schools, universities, and businesses enhance their offerings by integrating top-tier training into their programs.
About.trustP1: All certifications on Form-Cert meet rigorous EU standards and are recognized by employers and institutions across Europe. We partner only with accredited trainers and organizations to ensure the highest quality of education.
About.trustP2: Our platform is built on transparency, trust, and commitment to professional excellence. Every course, every certification, and every partnership is designed with your success in mind.
About.ctaDescription: Join Form-Cert today and take the next step in your professional development.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to common questions about Form-Cert, courses, certifications, and more.
FAQ.a1: Form-Cert is a professional training and certification platform that connects learners, trainers, and institutions. We offer EU-grade certifications and expert-led courses across multiple industries.
FAQ.a2: Yes! All certifications on Form-Cert meet rigorous EU standards and are designed by professionals in collaboration with EU-level bodies. They are recognized by employers and institutions across Europe.
FAQ.q3: How do I create an account?
FAQ.a3: Simply click on "Sign Up" in the navigation menu, choose your account type (Learner, Trainer, or Organization), fill in your details, and verify your email address to get started.
FAQ.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for institutional clients. All payments are processed securely through our encrypted payment gateway.
FAQ.a5: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all courses. If you're not satisfied with a course within 14 days of purchase and haven't completed more than 30% of the content, you can request a full refund.
FAQ.q6: How long do I have access to a course?
FAQ.a6: Once you enroll in a course, you have lifetime access to all course materials, including any future updates. You can learn at your own pace and revisit the content anytime.
FAQ.q7: Do you offer certificates for course completion?
FAQ.a7: Yes! Upon successful completion of a course and passing the final assessment, you'll receive an EU-grade certificate that you can download and share with employers or on professional networks.
FAQ.q8: Can I become a trainer on Form-Cert?
FAQ.a8: Absolutely! We welcome experienced professionals to become trainers. You'll need to submit your credentials and go through our verification process. Once approved, you can create and publish courses.
FAQ.q9: How do institutions partner with Form-Cert?
FAQ.a9: Schools, universities, and organizations can partner with Form-Cert to offer our courses to their students or employees. Contact our partnerships team to discuss custom solutions and pricing.
FAQ.q10: Is there a mobile app available?
FAQ.a10: Currently, Form-Cert is fully responsive and works seamlessly on all devices through your web browser. We're working on dedicated mobile apps for iOS and Android, coming soon!

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.description: Discover how Form-Cert connects learners, trainers, and schools to create a meaningful and world-class training experience.
HowItWorks.learnerStep1Desc: Explore thousands of courses across multiple categories. Filter by certification type, learning mode, and more.
HowItWorks.learnerStep2Desc: Choose online or in-person courses. Learn at your own pace with expert instructors and comprehensive materials.
HowItWorks.learnerStep3Desc: Complete your course and earn EU-recognized certifications that employers value and trust.
HowItWorks.trainerStep1Desc: Submit your credentials and expertise. Our team verifies your qualifications to ensure quality standards.
HowItWorks.trainerStep2Desc: Build your course content, set your pricing, and publish to thousands of potential learners.
HowItWorks.trainerStep3Desc: Share your expertise, engage with students, and earn income from your professional knowledge.
HowItWorks.schoolStep1Desc: Apply for accreditation and verification. We ensure your institution meets EU quality standards.
HowItWorks.schoolStep2Desc: Upload your complete course catalog and make it available to thousands of potential students.
HowItWorks.schoolStep3Desc: Connect with learners across Europe, expand your institutional presence, and grow enrollments.
HowItWorks.ctaDescription: Join thousands of learners, trainers, and institutions on Form-Cert today.

ForTrainers.doYouWantToTeach: Do You Want to Teach with Us?
ForTrainers.doYouWantToTeachDesc: Form-Cert is looking for qualified trainers ready to share their knowledge through the platform. Thanks to an intuitive publishing system and an established audience, you will be able to create, manage and sell your courses easily and professionally. We handle the technology — you focus on the content.
ForTrainers.noUpfrontCostsDesc: Competitive revenue share on every course enrollment. Top instructors earn €50,000+ annually.
ForTrainers.noTechnicalSkillsDesc: Access to over 500,000 active learners across Europe seeking quality training.
ForTrainers.fullControlDesc: Establish yourself as an industry expert and grow your professional reputation.
ForTrainers.officialCertDesc: Create and teach courses on your own schedule. Work from anywhere.
ForTrainers.continuousSupportDesc: Comprehensive tools, resources, and dedicated support to help you succeed.
ForTrainers.visibilityDesc: Enterprise-grade platform with all the features you need to deliver quality training.
ForTrainers.step1Desc: Sign up, verify your credentials, and build your professional profile.
ForTrainers.step2Desc: Use our intuitive tools to create engaging content, add materials, and structure your curriculum.
ForTrainers.step3Desc: Our team reviews your course to ensure it meets our quality standards.
ForTrainers.step4Desc: Your course goes live on Form-Cert. Start teaching, earn revenue, and grow your audience.
ForTrainers.opportunityTitle: A real opportunity for certified trainers.
ForTrainers.opportunityDesc: Whether you're an individual professional, a training school, or a company, Form-Cert gives you the tools, visibility, and technology to turn your expertise into results.
ForTrainers.ongoingSupportDesc: We don't just give you the tools — we walk with you.
ForTrainers.dedicatedOnboardingDesc: Step-by-step guidance to set up your profile and create your first course.
ForTrainers.technicalAssistanceDesc: Our support team is available to help with uploading, formatting, and publishing.
ForTrainers.contentOptimizationDesc: Learn best practices for creating effective and engaging training content.
ForTrainers.marketingVisibilityDesc: We help promote your courses to the right audience through the platform.
ForTrainers.ctaDescription: Join our community of professional trainers and share your expertise with thousands of learners across Europe.

ForSchool.bannerDescription: Publish your catalog and sell online.
ForSchool.aboutTitle: A Digital Platform for Your School
ForSchool.aboutDesc: Form-Cert provides schools and institutions with a complete, ready-to-use digital infrastructure to host, manage, and sell training programs online.
ForSchool.fullDigitalCatalogDesc: Upload and manage all your courses in one place with a stunning online catalog.
ForSchool.registrationTrackingDesc: Manage student registrations, track progress, and generate performance reports.
ForSchool.certificationIssuanceDesc: Automatically generate and deliver certificates upon course completion.
ForSchool.integratedPaymentsDesc: Accept payments securely with our integrated payment processing.
ForSchool.analyticsInsightsDesc: Access comprehensive data and reports on enrollment, completion, and revenue.
ForSchool.brandedExperienceDesc: Customize the platform with your school's branding for a seamless experience.
ForSchool.step1Desc: Submit your school's credentials and course catalog for review.
ForSchool.step2Desc: Configure your school's profile, branding, and course offerings.
ForSchool.step3Desc: Upload course content, set pricing, and make them available to learners.
ForSchool.step4Desc: Attract students, manage enrollments, and earn revenue from your programs.
ForSchool.solutionsTitle: Tailored solutions for different educational needs
ForSchool.solutionsDesc: Whether you're a school, university, or training center, we have the right solution for you.
ForSchool.vocationalSchoolsDesc: Offer certified professional courses and manage student enrollment online.
ForSchool.universitiesDesc: Extend your course offerings with online programs and EU-recognized certifications.
ForSchool.trainingCentersDesc: Digitize your training catalog and reach more students across Europe.
ForSchool.whatYouCanDo: What you can do with Form-Cert
ForSchool.whatYouCanDoDesc: Our platform gives schools everything they need to succeed in digital education.
ForSchool.publishCoursesDesc: Create and publish both online and in-person training courses.
ForSchool.manageCertificatesDesc: Automatically issue certificates to students who complete programs.
ForSchool.trackProgressDesc: Monitor student progress with detailed analytics and reports.
ForSchool.ctaDescription: Join Form-Cert and reach thousands of students across Europe.

Partnerships.bannerDescription: Join our network and grow together.
Partnerships.aboutDesc: Form-Cert's partnership program empowers organizations to become territorial orientation centers, connecting local communities with quality training and certification opportunities.
Partnerships.localPresenceDesc: Become the reference point for professional training in your area.
Partnerships.revenueSharingDesc: Earn competitive revenue shares on every enrollment you facilitate.
Partnerships.brandRecognitionDesc: Associate your brand with EU-grade training excellence.
Partnerships.dedicatedSupportDesc: Get dedicated support and resources from the Form-Cert team.
Partnerships.marketingMaterialsDesc: Access professional marketing tools and co-branded materials.
Partnerships.exclusiveTerritoryDesc: Secure exclusive partnership rights in your geographical area.
Partnerships.step1Desc: Submit your application and tell us about your organization and goals.

Partnerships.step3Desc: Begin promoting Form-Cert courses and certifications in your area.

Partnerships.opportunityTitle: A unique opportunity for local organizations
Partnerships.opportunityDesc: Whether you're a consulting firm, an employment agency, or a local institution, Form-Cert gives you the tools and support to become a training hub in your area.
Partnerships.ctaDescription: Join our network and help bring quality training to your community.
